title: Policy Gradient Methods
summary: A type of reinforcement learning algorithm that updates the policy directly. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Policy Optimization. Start after Policy Function and Policy Networks. It opens into Policy Gradient for Control and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG).

panels.label: What it is not

panels.label: Common confusion
panels.body: Ask whether the term changes policy, reward, exploration, or control dynamics. Compare it against Policy Gradient for Control and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) so the boundary stays visible instead of collapsing into a synonym pile.
